title: $PROC_PROFILING_SEPARATOR
text: $PROC_PROFILING_SEPARATOR Set the profiling format. $PROC_PROFILING_SEPARATOR = SeparatorCode Arguments SeparatorCode —one of: Gold —a Uniface separator, that is, GOLD semicolon ( ; ); default Tab —a Tab character Comma —a comma ( , ) Semicolon —a semicolon ( ; ) Defaults Assignment file: client assignment files Section: [SETTINGS] Default value: Gold Description $PROC_PROFILING_SEPARATOR determines which separator is used to separate the items in the profiling information. You can define a separator for use outside of Uniface. The default separator is Gold ( ; ). Example: $PROC_PROFILING_SEPARATOR In this example, you define a comma to separate the profiling information. $PROC_PROFILING_SEPARATOR=comma Copy Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
